warnings: visual_grammar.motion: candidates present but no `selected` — dimension degrades

smallTitle.marker: 64px sage hairline rule (1px, #9EC187) below the overline
smallTitle.usage: eyebrows/overlines above headings — Montserrat 600 caps pine + sage hairline

identity.essence: AI4comms turns AI from abstract hype into usable operating practice for communications teams — in Dutch, on the ground, one routekaart at a time.
identity.positioning: For Dutch-speaking communications professionals under pressure to adopt AI responsibly, AI4comms is the enablement partner that translates AI tooling into practical routines — so teams gain impact without losing their craft or their judgment.

archetype.rationale: Driven by observed voice and posture on the deployed ai4-comms.com site: FAQ-led navigation, peer-register copy (je/jullie), practical how-to framing, and a brand refresh decision to abandon the earlier Magician+Ruler aspirational system in favour of what the client actually ships. Sage expresses as knowledgeable colleague — mastery made legible, never guru-elevated. Caregiver expresses as craft-protection and safe-adoption assurance — the routekaart as a patient guide, not emotional warmth.

personalityTraits: Practical — outcomes over theory; every concept has a hands-on next step
Approachable — explains rather than impresses; peer register, not guru register
Grounded — senior judgment, no hype, no jargon for jargon's sake
Patient — meets teams where they are; trusts the routekaart as the vehicle
Trustworthy — calm, clear, accountable; never oversells AI or undersells the team's craft

company.name: AI4Comms
company.description: AI4comms helps communications leaders turn AI from abstract hype into practical advantage through strategy, training, governance, and hands-on implementation support.

services.name: AI Strategy for Communications Teams
services.description: Strategic advisory for communication leaders who need to define where AI creates real value across corporate communications, public affairs, media relations, and content operations.

services.name: AI Training and Team Enablement
services.description: Practical training programs that help communications teams adopt AI tools responsibly, improve workflows, and build confidence without drowning in jargon.

services.name: Governance and Responsible AI for Comms
services.description: Policy, governance, and operating-model support for organizations that need to use AI in communications without creating reputational, legal, or workflow risk.

services.name: Executive AI Advisory
services.description: Senior advisory support for leaders who need a clear view on how AI is reshaping communications functions, stakeholder expectations, and team structures.

boilerplate.copyright: © {{year}} Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V. Alle rechten voorbehouden.

principles: Typographic-led: whitespace and heading hierarchy carry the page — imagery is supplementary, not structural
Light-mode-first: the brand lives on white and paper surfaces; dark sections (#15311A canopy) are deliberate exceptions, not the default
Monotypeface discipline: Montserrat handles every typographic role (display through caption); the single-typeface constraint signals systematic clarity, not impoverishment
Accent as signal, not decoration: sage green (#9EC187) appears at active indicators, hairline rules, and section overlines — never as fill or background wash
Constrained motif vocabulary: the deployed site has no decorative motif system; rhythm comes from whitespace, the F8FAFC→ECECEC header gradient, and 64px sage hairline rules paired under overlines
No hero photography by default: type and whitespace carry the page; photography (when used) is bright, human-scale, and largely untouched
Peer register in copy: leads with the point, then explains; uses the team's own language (routekaart, communicatieprofessionals); asks honest rhetorical questions and answers them plainly
signatureElements: Montserrat 700 headings in canopy (#15311A) on white or paper surfaces
F8FAFC→ECECEC diagonal header gradient (135deg) as page/section opener
64px wide sage (#9EC187) hairline rule (1px) paired under overlines
Overlines: Montserrat 600, 12px, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.12em, in pine (#214C28)
CTA buttons: canopy fill with wide-tracked uppercase Montserrat 600 label; ghost variant with canopy border
Outlined cards with 1px #ECECEC border and 12px radius on white surface
Body text 14px / line-height 1.7 (matches deployed Divi global presets)
antiPatterns: Dark-mode-native layouts — the brand is light-first; the aspirational Signal Authority dark system is archived
Neon or high-chroma greens — the accent is muted sage (#9EC187), not the former phosphor #44E88A
Syne or Inter typefaces — replaced by Montserrat across all roles
Abstract data-texture or architectural photography — does not match the deployed light typographic identity
Decorative motif shapes (dark dividers, hatched tiles from Phase 3 aspirational) — archived, not canonical
White-on-dark logo placement — no white logo variant exists; avoid placing the green wordmark on dark surfaces
Guru or authority register in copy — 'Signal through the noise', 'Transform your communications', 'Disrupt' are explicitly prohibited
Accent sage used as fill color or background wash — accent is a hairline/indicator signal only
Multiple typeface families — single-typeface constraint is a deliberate discipline, not a gap

spec.rhythm: alternating canopy-dark / paper-light (the deployed section rhythm)

photo.overlay: canopy #15311A scrim on hero, never neon

spec.geometry: soft directional; low-contrast washes, never high-chroma

spec.columns: 12-col symmetric; centered text blocks + alternating 1/2 image·1/2 text splits

spec.style: stroke-led geometric, generous rounded corners (echoes the rounded logo panel + pills)
spec.fillVsLine: canopy line-dominant + a soft SAGE FILL accent (leaf/dot/tick) — a fill, not a dot-terminal (distinct from stromy/amaris)
spec.setPolicy: OPEN set — icons drawn to this STYLE on demand per slide/section need. The sample is representative, not a closed brand-bound set; the agent may add/select as many icons as a deck requires, keeping the style.

spec.shadows: none/minimal — depth via border + generous radius
spec.signature: the fully-rounded pill is the elevation signature

elements: two-tone heading — key phrase in sage #9EC187 within a canopy heading (verified on live site)
64px sage hairline rule (1px) under Montserrat-600 caps overlines
spec.note: honest to the 'typographic-led, imagery supplementary' principle; no invented graphical motif

spec.usage: image+text splits (supplementary, not structural per principle); canopy scrim on hero
spec.subjects: real communications professionals in real settings; never abstract data-texture or architectural (anti-pattern)

evidence.source: live site uses calm fade-in-on-scroll; full motion spec deferred to P6 (PLAN_motion-capability.md)

treatments.note: Named brand house looks applied to photography DOWNSTREAM (format-MCP + website), never pre-baked. Restrained, warm-neutral; canopy-duotone is the forest signature. Imagery is supplementary (typographic-led brand). Overlay = canopy #15311A scrim, never neon. ORG-PLAN-045.

documentary-warm.label: Documentary Warm
documentary-warm.usage: Natural warm-neutral, lightly desaturated — the default for content + image/text splits. Matches the deployed muted comms photography.

canopy-duotone.label: Canopy Duotone
canopy-duotone.usage: Signature forest duotone for hero + covers — deep canopy shadows through pine mids to sage-tinted paper highlights. The AI4comms nature signature.

sage-graded.label: Sage Graded
sage-graded.usage: Soft green cinematic grade for section imagery — cool-green shadows, sage highlights. Restrained, calm.

paper-soft.label: Paper Soft
paper-soft.usage: High-key lifted grade for airy light sections — low contrast, bright. Use where whitespace leads.

logo._note: Live deployed brand has only one logo variant (green wordmark on light backgrounds). White-on-dark variant, icon-only mark, and square mark variants are NOT deployed and have been intentionally omitted. Reintroduce only when client commissions them.
